description: Guardrail engine optimizations: EvalSymlinks cache (62.2), post_tool content dedup + security pre-screen (62.3), normalizeCommand fast-path (62.4)

post_tool_non_test.note: Security pre-screen (62.3) skips 12 regex patterns for clean source files; 0 allocs

post_tool_test_file.note: Deduplication of getChangedContent call (62.3); tampering + security now share one content read

dod_targets.post_tool_test_file_note: 49.5% improvement (bonus — not a primary DoD target)
